operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Sweeper database system state model tracks overall system status and related conditions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the Sorter Sweeper Database includes a System State Model that keeps track of system status, whether chutes should remain closed after a bag out, and whether sort data is being received.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / System State Model'
Text: 'Keeps track of the System Status, if chutes are to be kept closed after a bag out, and if we are getting sort data.'

relationships.target: chute closed condition after bag out

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database System State Model reference. The model keeps track of system status, whether chutes are to be kept closed after a bag out, and whether sort data is being received.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Defined System Status values in the Sorter Sweeper System State Model
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide enumerates the System Status values used by the System State Model: StartingUp, StartUpRequested, Running, ShutDownRequested, Shutdown, ZoneConfigRequested, ZoneConfigStaging, CloseOutRequested, CloseOutStaging, and CloseOutStaged.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Status values in the Sorter Sweeper Database System State Model are StartingUp, StartUpRequested, Running, ShutDownRequested, Shutdown, ZoneConfigRequested, ZoneConfigStaging, CloseOutRequested, CloseOutStaging, and CloseOutStaged.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System state model includes closeout and zone configuration staging states
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The listed status values indicate the model represents requested and staging phases for zone configuration and closeout operations, in addition to startup, running, and shutdown states.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The Sorter Sweeper System State Model includes requested and staging states for startup, shutdown, zone configuration, and closeout, including CloseOutStaged as a final listed closeout state.
